Facility Team
Usecase Name:
Request item pickup from drop-off zone
A buyer requests item pickup from a designated drop-off zone on campus.
Triggering Event
Buyer and seller agree on the sale, and buyer opts for pickup at a drop-off zone.
Breif Description:

After submitting the item pick up request, the buyer selects a preferred drop-off location and time slot. The system notifies the seller and facilities team. The item is then made available for pickup from the chosen zone.
Buyer, Seller
Related Use Case

Rate Seller
Successful Swap Email Confirmation

Facilities Team
Campus Security

Item pick up request submitted.
Drop-off service must be enabled
Drop-off service must be enabled

Pickup request is recorded
Drop-off slot is booked
Seller & Buyer receive PIN
Item is marked as “awaiting pickup”
Flow of Activities

1. Buyer submits the item pickup request
2. Buyer selects preferred zone and time
3.Seller accepts or requests reschedule
--> If Accepted



--> If not Accepted(Reschedule)
4.1 Seller selects new preferred zone and time
5. Buyer accepts or reschedules again

1.1 System prompts for drop-off location and time
2.1 System notifies seller of buyer’s preferred zone and time
2.2 Seller receives the notification

(Decision: Accepted?)
3.1 System confirms pickup request
3.2 System generates PIN
3.3 System notifies both buyer and seller with the PIN
3.4 System updates item status to "awaiting pickup"

4.1.1 System notifies buyer of seller’s new preferred zone and time

(Cycle may repeat until confirmed)
Exception Conditions:

1.1 Seller doesn’t respond in time
2.1 System is not available
3.1 Item is still listed while confirming the booking
Usecase Name:
Set Alert for Desired Item
A buyer wants a specific item but it's currently not listed. The buyer sets an alert based on item keywords or category.
Triggering Event
Buyer cannot find a desired item during search and opts to be notified when it becomes available.
Breif Description:

The buyer creates an alert specifying a category or keywords (e.g., “Table,” “CS101 textbook”). When a seller later posts an item that matches the alert criteria, both the buyer and the seller receive notifications – enabling faster communication and potential transaction.
Buyer, Seller
Related Use Case

Search Listings
Create Listing

Buyers
Sellers

Buyer must be logged in
Alert system must be functional
Alerts must be enabled for both parties

Alert is saved in the system
If a matching item is posted, buyer and seller are alerted
Optionally, buyer can initiate chat or proposal
Flow of Activities

1. Buyer searches for an item and finds no matching results

2. Buyer clicks “Set Alert” and defines criteria
(e.g., category, keyword)

3. Later, Seller posts a new listing

1.1 System prompts “Set Alert” option

2.1 System saves alert configuration and enables background monitoring

3.1 System matches new listing with stored alerts
3.2 If a match is found, system sends alert to Buyer (with listing link) & seller with user profile
Exception Conditions:

1.1 Buyer enters invalid or vague keywords
3.1 No alerts match the new listing
3.2 Alerts failed due to system issue or user settings
